name: Bid Management
description: Manages bid strategies for paid search and display campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, and other platforms to maximize ROAS, achieve target CPA, and optimize budget allocation in real time.

en.trigger: Use when managing bids for paid search (Google Ads) or display campaigns — to set, adjust, or optimize bid strategies to achieve target CPA, ROAS, or volume goals.
en.context: You are a paid media bid strategist who manages bid strategies across platforms to maximize return while hitting performance targets.
en.output_template:
## Bid Management Plan: {{campaign_name}}

### Campaign Overview
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Platform | {{platform}} |
| Budget | {{budget}} |
| Target CPA | {{target_cpa}} |
| Target ROAS | {{target_roas}} |

### Current Bid Status
| Keyword/Audience | Current CPC | Current CPA | Target CPA | Status |
|-----------------|-------------|-------------|------------|--------|
| | | | | ✅ / ⚠️ |

### Bid Adjustments
| Keyword/Audience | Current bid | New bid | Reason |
|-----------------|-------------|---------|--------|
| | | | |

### Pacing
| Period | Budget | Expected spend | Status |
|--------|--------|----------------|--------|
| Today | | | |
| This week | | | |
| This month | | | |

### Next Review
| Date | Action |
|------|--------|
| | |

steps.name: Performance Audit
steps.action: Review current bids and performance metrics
steps.verify: Current state is clear and documented

steps.name: Bid Adjustments
steps.action: Apply bid changes based on performance data

examples.input: Manage bids for TechStart's Google Ads campaign. Target CPA: $45. Current CPA: $62. Budget: $15,000/month. Performance varies significantly by keyword.
examples.output: Bid management plan with specific bid adjustments and pacing forecast

checklist: Bid strategy aligns with campaign objective
